title: Gaining Strength
subtitle: Growth and weight increase
description: By week 29, your baby continues to gain weight and build strength. Muscles and lungs are developing further, and movements remain strong and regular.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements remain strong and consistent
You may feel more pressure as your baby grows
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow a consistent routine
Practice light exercise and ensure adequate rest

medical_checkups.note: Frequent monitoring continues during the third trimester.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors maternal health and fetal growth

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may schedule more regular visits to closely track your progress.

important_note: Steady weight gain is an important part of your baby’s development.
reassurance: Your baby is growing stronger each day as you move closer to delivery.
medical_disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider if you notice any unusual symptoms or discomfort.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports healthy weight gain and development.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be monitored more frequently during this stage.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron supports increased blood volume and oxygen supply.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your strength and energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure is essential during this stage of increased physical demand.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring may be more frequent.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing growth and metabolic function.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As growth continues, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support healthy development.
